title: Oden Sails with Roger Toward the World’s Truth
description: On pages 1–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Oden, Orochi, Unknown person #2, Unknown person #3, Unknown person #4 as Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
scene: Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Stop, Oden! If you get angry over something trivial like this

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no need to worry, Lord Orochi... have faith in my "Bari Bari" technique

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Because this barrier won't allow anyone to come closer...

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Your strength won't help you, Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As a pirate, you should know...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: About the abnormal power of "devil fruits"!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, but they call us "magicians" in this country...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Muhahaha Oden!!! Using force and anger to solve problems...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The other villages' Daimyo tried that as well!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Did you see?! Lord open dashed towards the Palace!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The legitimate heir of the Kozuki clan has returned!!

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Wonderful!! We will have a new shogun!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He will definitely take care of Orochi!! And of Kaido too!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I don't know the reason, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apparently, my father appointed you as a "Proy Shogun"....

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Until the day I would return!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So return the title of "shogun" at once!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It wasn't my goal to become famous or anything...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But under my rule, Wano will be in a much better state!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden, Roger, and the Final Voyage storyline with 42 dialogue beats. Oden travels with Roger, reaches the truth of the world, and returns to a Wano already being poisoned by Orochi and Kaido.
